title: Public Context Game
genericDescription: Design for a specific venue or community; account for facilitation, access, and presentation; prepare public documentation.
specificDescription: Build a game for a concrete public context such as classroom, museum, gallery, conference, online festival, workplace training, creator community, or AI literacy workshop. Include installation or facilitation notes.
gradingRubric: 30 pts context fit; 20 pts facilitation readiness; 20 pts accessibility; 15 pts documentation; 15 pts playtest evidence.
